data.title: Private Security Market Expected to Reach $531.5 Billion by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 7.8% -- Allied Market Research
data.description: A recent report titled 'Private Security Market' by Allied Market Research indicates significant growth opportunities for the sector in the next decade. With increasing terrorism threats and a growing demand for cybersecurity-integrated services, the market is predicted to expand rapidly. The report, published on April 15, 2026 in WILMINGTON, Del., highlights these trends and forecasts a surge in technology adoption within the industry. This suggests that the Private Security Market is poised for substantial growth in the coming years, with key numbers indicating a promising outlook for the sector.

data.title: ENGWE Launches ZIP Folding E-Bike Alongside 12th Anniversary Celebration Offers
data.description: Today in Berlin, ENGWE, a leading global e-bike company, introduced the ENGWE ZIP, a foldable electric bike specifically designed for frequent city commuters. This new model is priced at €999 or £899 and is being launched as part of ENGWE's 12th Anniversary campaign which includes a total value package worth €357. The ENGWE ZIP is tailored for...

data.title: Fireblocks debuts Earn for institutions to earn yield on idle stablecoins using Aave and Morpho, with enhanced security.
data.description: The integration of Aave and Morpho protocols into Fireblocks' latest Earn product allows institutional clients to earn yield on their stablecoin holdings while benefiting from enterprise-grade controls. This feature enables clients to take advantage of attractive yield opportunities while ensuring security and efficiency in managing their assets. This new development is set to provide a significant boost to clients' APY potential, potentially increasing their yields by a considerable margin.

data.title: In 2025, Crypto Valley in Switzerland attracted 47% of Europe's blockchain VC, raising $728M through 31 deals, up 37% YoY. TON's $400M round led to half total investment, reflecting a trend towards larger bets.
data.description: In 2025, Crypto Valley saw a significant increase in funding, raising a total of $728 million through 31 deals, marking a 37% year-over-year growth. The $400 million raised by TON in one round contributed to half of the total funding, indicating a trend where capital is increasingly focused on fewer but larger investments in the crypto sector.

data.title: Trident Intersects 4.61 g/t Au over 38.48m from 77.00m, including 5.48 g/t over 26.14m from Hole 26028 – 200m ENE of 2025 Drilling. Hole 26025 intersects 11.97 g/t over 10.70m from 324.20m at Contact Lake, Expands Winter Drill Program
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia, April 15, 2026 - Trident Resources Corp. (TSXV: ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) has released the assay results for the first 9 diamond drill holes as part of the ongoing winter drill program at the Contact Lake Gold Project in northern Saskatchewan. Hole CL26028 yielded significant gold values in broad zones within the Bakos Shear zone, located more than 200m ENE from the high-grade gold discovery in hole CL25003 from the 2025 fall drill program, which previously reported 7.03 g/t over 43.25m from 121.00m depth. Due to these promising results, the Company has decided to increase the current winter drilling phase from 10,000m to 13,000m.

data.title: Fraudulent Ledger Live app swindles 50+ crypto users of $9.5M; Apple pulls it from store.
data.description: Apple recently took down a deceptive Ledger Live app that scammed more than 50 cryptocurrency investors, resulting in a loss of $9.5 million. The app used a bait-and-switch method to collect seed phrases from users.
